allow: PowerShell(python -c "import pandas, numpy, matplotlib, scipy; print\('core ok:', pandas.__version__, numpy.__version__\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(python -c "import jupyter_core, nbconvert, nbclient, nbformat; print\('jupyter stack ok'\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(pip install scipy statsmodels --quiet 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15; Write-Output "---EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE---"; python -c "import scipy, statsmodels; print\('scipy', scipy.__version__, '| statsmodels', statsmodels.__version__\)")
